title: AN ACT AMENDING A CERTAIN ITEM OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED NINETY-THREE, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES."

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3780 / 57 OG No. 10, 1740 (March 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2856, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING A CERTAIN ITEM OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED NINETY-THREE, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. On page 250 of Republic Act Numbered Twenty hundred ninety-three, item (

g

), under Group II for the Province of Negros Oriental, and under Title Mâ Short Term Projects, is hereby amended to read as follows :

"(

g

) Cangmalalag-Cabulihan feeder road, Larenaâ

Repair and/or construction ------- P10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
